title: Corallium rubrum genome and transcripts alignment
author: Ganot, Philippe
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Corallium rubrum , the precious red coral, is an octocoral endemic to the western Mediterranean Sea. It plays a key role in the well-known Mediterranean coralligenous ecosystem, a biodiversity hotspot. We sequenced its genome for further investigations into its biology (skeleton formation and color, genetic diversity), ecology, and evolutionary history.
steps_raw: Corallium rubrum , the precious red coral, is an octocoral endemic to the western Mediterranean Sea. It plays a key role in the well-known Mediterranean coralligenous ecosystem, a biodiversity hotspot. We sequenced its genome for further investigations into its biology (skeleton formation and color, genetic diversity), ecology, and evolutionary history.
